field: 生成图像检测 (Generated Image Detection)
_note: Illustrative shape only. In real use every node MUST come from scripts/papers.py output, not from memory.

nodes.problem: GAN生成图像在社交网络上的溯源
nodes.contribution: 发现GAN留下可检测的CNN指纹

nodes.title: CNN-generated images are surprisingly easy to spot... for now
nodes.problem: 跨不同GAN模型的泛化检测

nodes.title: Leveraging Frequency Analysis for Deep Fake Image Recognition
nodes.problem: GAN上采样导致的频域伪影
nodes.contribution: 从频谱而非像素域检测

nodes.title: DIRE for Diffusion-Generated Image Detection
nodes.problem: 扩散模型生成图像的检测
nodes.contribution: 用重建误差(DIRE)作为通用判据

nodes.title: Towards Universal Fake Image Detectors that Generalize Across Generative Models
nodes.contribution: 用冻结的CLIP特征做通用检测
